scripts.start: concurrently -n common,components,app -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run start -w @demo/common" "npm run start -w @demo/components" "npm run start -w @demo/app"
scripts._start:ui-standalone: concurrently -n ui,common,components,app -c magenta,cyan,green,yellow "npm run start -w @demo/ui" "npm run start -w @demo/common" "npm run start -w @demo/components" "npm run start -w @demo/app"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @demo/common && npm run build -w @demo/components && npm run build -w @demo/app
